allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: EnvVarSwitcher \(evs\) tool

A PowerShell tool to quickly switch between different environment variable configurations.

Features:
- evs list: List all available profiles
- evs use <name>: Switch to specified profile
- evs show: Show current state or preview a profile
- evs clear: Clear all variables set by current profile
- evs add/edit/remove: Manage profiles

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
